</td><td>

ValidationBehavior


</td><td>

_(Optional)_ How to handle steps with invalid task references - 'ignore': Skip rendering, use empty or placeholder description - 'warn': Log warning, render with placeholder - 'fail': Return Failure result Default: 'warn'

</td><td>

`readonly`


</td><td>

ValidationBehavior


</td><td>

_(Optional)_ How to handle missing variables during template rendering - 'ignore': Render with empty values for missing variables - 'warn': Log warning, render with empty values - 'fail': Return Failure result Default: 'warn'
